title: Alleged kidnappers back in court
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The three men accused of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The three men accused of kidnapping a 16-year-old girl from a residence in JCC Camp in December reappeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court last week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The three men accused of kidnapping a 16-year-old girl from a residence in JCC Camp in December reappeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court last week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The men - aged 30, 38 and 48 - are facing charges of kidnapping and abduction.","html":"The men - aged 30, 38 and 48 - are facing charges of kidnapping and abduction."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their next court date is scheduled for 13 November for a possible plea and trial."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They were previously denied bail and have remained in police custody since their arrest, a few hours after the alleged kidnapping took place on 24 December.","html":"They were previously denied bail and have remained in police custody since their arrest, a few hours after the alleged kidnapping took place on 24 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Girl allegedly abducted in Da Gamaskop reunited with family","Alleged kidnapping: bail postponed for 10 April","Bail application for alleged kidnappers postponed","Alleged kidnappers' bail postponed again"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
